name: nextjs
appliesWhen: preferredStack matches /^nextjs/i OR T-000-discovery locks Next.js as primary frontend

officialRepos.name: vercel/next.js
officialRepos.why: Official Next.js source. /examples folder has dozens of patterns.

officialRepos.name: shadcn-ui/ui
officialRepos.why: Copy-paste Radix + Tailwind components. The recommended UI primitive set.

officialRepos.name: vercel/examples
officialRepos.why: Official patterns, starters, edge functions, auth flows from Vercel.

officialRepos.name: drizzle-team/drizzle-orm
officialRepos.why: Drizzle ORM source. Recommended for serverless / edge.

officialRepos.name: TanStack/query
officialRepos.why: TanStack Query v5 for server state.
